scenarios.title: User navigates to Dashboard and sees summary cards
scenarios.userAction: User opens the Dashboard page from the sidebar navigation
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Summary cards display Total Tasks, Completed, In Progress, and Pending counts; recent tasks table is visible
scenarios.testReference: AP-T164: Page Load - User navigates to Dashboard and sees summary cards

scenarios.title: User clicks a task row and navigates to task detail
scenarios.userAction: User clicks a task name link in the recent tasks table
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Browser navigates to /tasks/:id, task detail page is displayed with the correct task name
scenarios.testReference: AP-T165: Navigation - User clicks a task row and navigates to task detail

scenarios.title: User navigates between Dashboard and Tasks via sidebar
scenarios.userAction: User clicks Tasks in the sidebar, then clicks Dashboard in the sidebar
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Each page loads correctly with its title visible; URL updates to /tasks then /dashboard
scenarios.testReference: AP-T166: Navigation - User navigates between Dashboard and Tasks via sidebar
